sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83043" key="piasth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῐαστήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n83043.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πιεστήριος</ref> </xr> (q. v.).</sense> </entryFree>
